title: SoundHound AI (SOUN) Expands Platform With LivePerson Deal, Analyst Maintains Buy Rating
text: SoundHound AI Inc. announced a definitive agreement to acquire LivePerson, an enterprise conversational AI platform company, for approximately $250 million in total enterprise value at closing. Following this announcement, DA Davidson analyst Gil Luria maintained a Buy rating on SOUN stock with a $14.00 price target. The analyst stated that the LivePerson acquisition will add scale and value to the stock, supporting its long-term growth and helping it expand its AI conversational platform. The analysts acknowledged that this represents SoundHound's largest acquisition to date and carries some integration risks. However, they view the deal favorably, noting it adds significant scale to the company's business and is also accretive on a valuation basis. The acquisition strengthens SoundHound's position as a voice AI solutions provider for businesses by expanding its conversational AI capabilities through LivePerson's established platform and customer base.
